name: rufflo
description: Rufflo Marketplace: Claude Code native agents, swarms, workers, and MCP tools for continuous software engineering

plugins.name: rufflo-core
plugins.description: Core Rufflo MCP tools, commands, and Claude Code orchestration patterns

plugins.name: rufflo-swarm
plugins.description: Agent teams, swarm coordination, Monitor streams, and worktree isolation

plugins.name: rufflo-loop-workers
plugins.description: Cache-aware /loop workers and CronCreate background automation

plugins.name: rufflo-security-audit
plugins.description: Security review, dependency scanning, policy gates, and CVE monitoring

plugins.name: rufflo-rag-memory
plugins.description: RufVector memory with HNSW search, AgentDB, and semantic retrieval

plugins.name: rufflo-testgen
plugins.description: Test gap detection, coverage analysis, and automated test generation

plugins.name: rufflo-docs
plugins.description: Documentation generation, drift detection, and API docs automation

plugins.name: rufflo-autopilot
plugins.description: Autonomous /loop-driven task completion with learning, prediction, and progress tracking

plugins.name: rufflo-intelligence
plugins.description: Self-learning neural intelligence with SONA patterns, trajectory learning, and model routing

plugins.name: rufflo-agentdb
plugins.description: AgentDB memory controllers with HNSW vector search, RufVector embeddings, and causal graphs

plugins.name: rufflo-aidefence
plugins.description: AI safety scanning, PII detection, prompt injection defense, and adaptive threat learning

plugins.name: rufflo-browser
plugins.description: Agentic browser automation with Playwright for testing, scraping, and UI interaction

plugins.name: rufflo-jujutsu
plugins.description: Advanced git workflows with diff analysis, risk scoring, and reviewer recommendations

plugins.name: rufflo-agent
plugins.description: Agent runtimes — local WASM-sandboxed agents (rvagent) + Anthropic Claude Managed Agents (cloud); one interface, local-vs-cloud backends

plugins.name: rufflo-workflows
plugins.description: Visual workflow automation with templates, orchestration, and lifecycle management

plugins.name: rufflo-daa
plugins.description: Dynamic Agentic Architecture with cognitive patterns, knowledge sharing, and adaptive agents

plugins.name: rufflo-rufllm
plugins.description: RufLLM local inference with chat formatting, MicroLoRA fine-tuning, and SONA adaptation

plugins.name: rufflo-rvf
plugins.description: RVF format for portable agent memory, session persistence, and cross-platform transfer

plugins.name: rufflo-plugin-creator
plugins.description: Scaffold, validate, and publish new Claude Code plugins with proper structure

plugins.name: rufflo-goals
plugins.description: Long-horizon goal planning, deep research orchestration, and adaptive replanning using GOAP

plugins.name: rufflo-adr
plugins.description: ADR lifecycle management — create, index, supersede, and link Architecture Decision Records to code

plugins.name: rufflo-cost-tracker
plugins.description: Token usage tracking, model cost attribution per agent, budget alerts, and optimization recommendations

plugins.name: rufflo-ddd
plugins.description: Domain-Driven Design scaffolding — bounded contexts, aggregate roots, domain events, and anti-corruption layers

plugins.name: rufflo-federation
plugins.description: Cross-installation agent federation with zero-trust security, PII-gated data flow, and compliance-grade audit trails

plugins.name: rufflo-graph-intelligence
plugins.description: Real-time graph intelligence — personalized PageRank, streaming delta updates, witness-signed reasoning, and federation-distributable vectors

plugins.name: rufflo-iot-cognitum
plugins.description: IoT device lifecycle, telemetry anomaly detection, fleet management, and witness chain verification for Cognitum Seed hardware

plugins.name: rufflo-knowledge-graph
plugins.description: Knowledge graph construction — entity extraction, relation mapping, and pathfinder graph traversal

plugins.name: rufflo-market-data
plugins.description: Market data ingestion — feed normalization, OHLCV vectorization, and HNSW-indexed pattern matching

plugins.name: rufflo-migrations
plugins.description: Schema migration management — generate, validate, dry-run, and rollback database migrations

plugins.name: rufflo-neural-trader
plugins.description: Neural trading strategies — self-learning LSTM/Transformer/N-BEATS models with Rust/NAPI backtesting

plugins.name: rufflo-observability
plugins.description: Structured logging, distributed tracing, and metrics — correlate agent swarm activity with application telemetry

plugins.name: rufflo-rufvector
plugins.description: Self-learning vector database — HNSW, FlashAttention-3, Graph RAG, hybrid search, DiskANN, and Brain AGI

plugins.name: rufflo-sparc
plugins.description: SPARC methodology — Specification, Pseudocode, Architecture, Refinement, Completion phases with quality gates

plugins.name: rufflo-metaharness
plugins.description: MetaHarness integration — surfaces score/genome/mint/mcp-scan/threat-model via skills; pairs with @metaharness/router (ADR-148/149) for cost-optimal model routing; honors ADR-150 optional-augmentation constraint

plugins.name: rufflo-arena
plugins.description: Competitive ruliology for rufflo swarms — arenas, tournaments, and adaptive co-evolution of program strategies (ADR-147/148); strategies-as-programs compete under payoff games
